name: Polish Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Polish sausage, cut into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute sausage for 15 minutes; remove to a casserole dish.
2. Add oil from sausage drippings into the casserole; brown beef in oil, for 15 minutes; remove to the casserole dish.
3. Saute onions until softened; add them to the casserole.
4. Saute mushrooms with sauerkraut and wine.
5. Add tomato sauce, soy sauce, caraway seeds, and vegetable seasoning to the mixture.
6. Mix everything well and return it to the casserole dish.
7. Cover and bake at 375 degrees for 2 to 2 and a half hours, stirring every 30 minutes.
